## Checklist

- [ ] The resource is completely free (no paywall or credit card required)
- [ ] The resource is actively maintained OR a timeless classic
- [ ] It is not already on the list
- [ ] I added it to the correct category
- [ ] The description is one sentence and clearly explains what it is
- [ ] The link works and goes to the right page
